concepts.name: a wax-sealed diplomatic envelope with the flap torn open
concepts.blurb: the seal held until it didn't

concepts.name: a collapsed emergency food ration box with a bent corner
a single drone propeller blade snapped at the root
concepts.blurb: one clean break in forward motion

concepts.name: a latex glove inflated and knotted at the wrist
concepts.blurb: sealed from the inside, going nowhere

concepts.name: a crumpled ceasefire communiqué half-unfolded on a desk
a rusted padlock with no key in the shackle
a torn paper ballot with one corner missing
a smashed weather monitoring gauge with a cracked face
concepts.blurb: the sky still happened without a reading
